title: DoubleClicksPerSecond
description: This mod renders the clicks per second under the crosshair and lights up green when a double click happens.
body: This mod renders the clicks per second under the crosshair and lights up green when a double click happens. Note: a double click in this mod happens when the two inputs are ~50ms apart. Therefore, some normal clicks can be interpreted as double clicks. The player can choose a keybind to show/hide the CPS on the screen.
